subject: Cannot login to my account
description: I have been unable to access my account for the past 2 hours and keep receiving an error message saying my credentials are invalid even though I am sure they are correct

subject: Billing discrepancy on invoice
description: I noticed I was charged twice for my last subscription renewal and would like a refund for the duplicate charge immediately

subject: Application crashes on startup
description: The application is crashing immediately upon startup and I cannot use the application at all in its current state

subject: Feature request for dark mode
description: It would be great if the application had a dark mode option for nighttime use as it would reduce eye strain

subject: Cannot export data to CSV
description: The export feature is not working and returns an error when I try to export my data to a CSV file

subject: Account locked after password change
description: After resetting my password my account became locked and I cannot access it anymore even with the new password

subject: Performance issues with search
description: The search function is extremely slow taking over a minute to return results which is unacceptable

subject: Refund not processed
description: I submitted a refund request three weeks ago but have not received the refund yet and need a status update

subject: Production system is down critical
description: The production environment is completely down and all users are unable to access the service this is a critical security issue

subject: Cannot access API documentation
description: The API documentation link is broken and I cannot find information about the new endpoints that were mentioned

subject: 2FA setup is not working
description: When I try to enable two factor authentication the system does not send me the verification code

subject: Subscription cancellation failed
description: I attempted to cancel my subscription but the request failed and I am still being charged monthly

subject: Mobile app offline mode
description: It would be beneficial to have an offline mode so users can access cached data when internet is unavailable

subject: Error on checkout page
description: When I try to complete my purchase I get a 500 error on the checkout page and cannot proceed with payment

subject: Request for bulk user management
description: We need the ability to manage multiple user accounts at once for our enterprise deployment

subject: Login page broken on mobile
description: The login form is not displaying correctly on mobile devices making it impossible to access the application

subject: Data sync issues across devices
description: My data is not syncing properly between my desktop and mobile devices causing data inconsistencies

subject: Custom integration needed
description: We need the ability to integrate this application with our custom enterprise systems and APIs

subject: Payment method rejected
description: My credit card is being rejected even though it is valid and has sufficient funds available

subject: Advanced filtering feature request
description: We would like more advanced filtering options to help us search and sort our data more effectively
